ANGIE: Boy cursed by the heavens. Look a: ANGIE: Boy cursed by the heavens. Look at where your path has led you.
This is your punishment for resisting Ar: This is your punishment for resisting Arceus' divine decree.
Arceus itself has laid its judgment upon: Arceus itself has laid its judgment upon you.

???: I could be asking you three the sam: ???: I could be asking you three the same question, no?

My name is Kreiss. I am a man from Never: My name is Kreiss. I am a man from Neverwinter, and I am a Gym Leader.
I had heard news from an anonymous sourc: I had heard news from an anonymous source that someone from Terajuma was impersonating me.
So I took the opportunity to sail my way: So I took the opportunity to sail my way here and confront the hack fraud and settle things man to man.
Turns out the situation turned into man: Turns out the situation turned into man to woman, and before I could even say a word I was thrust into this domain.
I've been locked in this hot room ever s: I've been locked in this hot room ever since.

CRAWLI: But if it's not, then Kreiss is: CRAWLI: But if it's not, then Kreiss is gonna freeze to death in here.

But the fact is that you have the key fo: But the fact is that you have the key for my cell, and I must have it.
So, as a result, I will have to play the: So, as a result, I will have to play the thief in this scenario.

Alright, come then children. No hard fee: Alright, come then children. No hard feelings.
